case_title: JESSICA MASON HOFF VS. SUNG JOON KANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JESSICA MASON HOFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUNG JOON KANG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOFF, JESSICA MASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KANG, SUNG JOON SEE ATACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,536.43 FILED BY HOFF, JESSICA MASON AS TO DEFENDANT KANG, SUNG JOON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED DEC-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KANG, SUNG JOON
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
